task.objective: Fix StatusDonutChart and TestSummaryBar to correctly represent overlapping flaky data
task.context: The donut chart currently shows flaky as a pie slice alongside passed/failed. This is incorrect because: - Passed/Failed/Skipped are mutually exclusive (a test has one status) - Flaky is an orthogonal attribute (a test can be passed AND flaky) - Showing them as pie slices creates percentages that don't add to 100%
task.user_decisions: - Flaky indicator: Badge below chart (separate from pie) - Summary bar: Remove flaky from bar segments, keep as count badge

change.description: Update interface to replace flakyRate with flakyCount
Remove flaky from pie data array
change.before: const data = [ { name: "Passed", value: passRate, color: COLORS.passed }, { name: "Failed", value: failRate, color: COLORS.failed }, { name: "Flaky", value: flakyRate, color: COLORS.flaky }, ].filter((item) => item.value > 0)
change.after: const data = [ { name: "Passed", value: passRate, color: COLORS.passed }, { name: "Failed", value: failRate, color: COLORS.failed }, ].filter((item) => item.value > 0)

change.add:
{flakyCount !== undefined && flakyCount > 0 && (
{flakyCount} Flaky Tests
)}

change.description: Remove flaky from progress bar segments
change.action: Remove the flaky segment from the progress bar div

change.description: Add tooltip to flaky count in header
change.action: Wrap flaky badge with Tooltip component: "Flaky tests may also be counted as passed"

change.before:
<StatusDonutChart
  passRate={totalTests > 0 ? (passedTests / totalTests) * 100 : 0}
  failRate={totalTests > 0 ? (failedTests / totalTests) * 100 : 0}
  flakyRate={totalTests > 0 ? (flakyTests / totalTests) * 100 : 0}
/>

testing.test: Verify donut chart shows only passed/failed slices
Verify flaky badge appears below chart when flakyCount > 0
Verify summary bar shows passed/failed segments only
Verify flaky count still visible in header with tooltip
Run: npm run build (no TypeScript errors)

mandatory_final_step.action: Update status.md with phase completion: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Phase: 01_chart_data_fixes - Status: completed - Files modified list

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): phase-01 - Fix chart data to show mutually exclusive categories
